assertion_results.text: Output must score at least three areas at 4/5 or higher
assertion_results.evidence: Four areas at 4/5 or higher: CI/CD 5/5, Monitoring 5/5, Developer Experience 4/5, Ownership & culture 4/5.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend tooling the team already has (e.g. Datadog, feature flags, SLOs)
assertion_results.evidence: No recommendation to adopt Datadog, feature flags, or SLOs. Datadog Synthetics is recommended as a new capability ('Evaluate synthetic monitoring… e.g., Datadog Synthetics'), which is distinct from their existing Datadog setup. Feature flag lifecycle process is recommended, not feature flags themselves.

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one non-trivial medium- or long-term recommendation
assertion_results.evidence: Medium term: 'Introduce contract testing (Pact or equivalent) for Supabase RLS policies and any internal API boundaries.' Long term: 'Define a Quality Engineering charter before the team grows past 10.' Both are substantive and non-trivial.

assertion_results.text: Output must acknowledge the low incident rate of 0.1 P1/month
assertion_results.evidence: Executive summary: 'Delivery metrics are elite: 4.2 deploys/day, 12-minute MTTR, and 0.1 P1/month are genuinely rare.' Monitoring score evidence also cites the 0.1 P1/month figure.

assertion_results.text: Output must include at least one improvement item
assertion_results.evidence: Multiple improvements: CODEOWNERS 2-approval for high-risk paths, E2E coverage audit, contract testing, flakiness instrumentation, Quality Engineering charter.
